question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Number of arms", "Control regimen", "Control arm" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'
raw_model_output: {"sql": "SELECT \"NCT\", \"Trial name\", \"Cancer type\", \"Number of arms\", \"Control regimen\", \"Control arm\" FROM clinical_trials WHERE \"Cancer type\" = 'Colorectal' AND \"Number of arms\" >= 3 AND \"Control arm\" = 'Multikinase inhibitor'"}
